case_title: RENT A CENTER VS ROLLINS, BELINDA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY RENT A CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLINS, BELINDA ENGLISH, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLINS, BELINDA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ENGLISH, ROBERT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RENT A CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROLLINS, BELINDA ENGLISH, ROBERT $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,620.00, JUDGMENT IS FOR THE VALUE OF STEREO, TV & FURNITUR THAT IS THE SUBJECT OF THIS CONTRACT ACTION AND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THEREFORE, DEFENDANT'S OWN SUCH PROPERTY. (ROLLINS & ENGLISH)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFTS, RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
